justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted the user's time preferences throughout the conversation, even when the user initially provided an invalid time.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent only reported unavailability and asked the user to pick a new time without offering options.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent had one slightly redundant API call when it checked for availability at 9 AM and then again at 10 AM, even though it could have offered a range of times.
justifications.customer_experience: The customer experience was workable but tiring, as the agent repeatedly reported unavailability without proactively suggesting alternative times.
